hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if echo "$branch" | grep -qE "^(main|master|prd|stg|dev)$"; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"You are on protected branch '$branch'. Create a feature branch first: git fetch origin && git checkout -b feature/TICKET-desc origin/dev\"}"; else exit 0; fi
